The user's iPhone has its default language set to ENGLISH.PSAP systems may not render emojis/special characters correctly. Return messages will not be affected.Two-way text with the user is now available.[13:28:20 GMT-07:00 10 Jun 2026] (321) 310-2480: Responders may need to search an area extending at least 20 meters in all directions for a 95% chance of finding the user.The user's estimated altitude (HAE) is 52 meters. Their phone number is +13213102480.The user requests help with a CAR OR VEHICLE ISSUE emergency.[13:28:49 GMT-07:00 10 Jun 2026] (321) 310-2480: Our car not working [13:29:06 GMT-07:00 10 Jun 2026] Desiree Diaz has entered the chat[13:29:06 GMT-07:00 10 Jun 2026] Desiree Diaz: ARE YOU BLOCKING THE ROAD OR ON THE RIGHT HAND SHOULDER ? [13:29:32 GMT-07:00 10 Jun 2026] (321) 310-2480: Blocking road [13:29:47 GMT-07:00 10 Jun 2026] Desiree Diaz: WHAT COLOR AND KIND OF CAR ARE YOU IN ? [13:30:31 GMT-07:00 10 Jun 2026] (321) 310-2480: Dodge Pacifica black[13:31:09 GMT-07:00 10 Jun 2026] Desiree Diaz: IS IT A CHRYSLER PACIFCA ? WHAT IS WRONG WITH YOUR VEHICLE ? [13:32:11 GMT-07:00 10 Jun 2026] (321) 310-2480: Yes it is. We cannot get it to move the emergency brake apparently is on and we cannot turn it off back wheels do not move at all [13:33:55 GMT-07:00 10 Jun 2026] Desiree Diaz: OKAY. ARE YOU ON SOUTH SR1 JUST SOUTH OF BIXBY CREEK [13:35:02 GMT-07:00 10 Jun 2026] Desiree Diaz: DO YOU HAVE FUNDS TO PAY FOR A TOW TRUCK ? [13:37:08 GMT-07:00 10 Jun 2026] (321) 310-2480: We are right next to the bridge [13:38:52 GMT-07:00 10 Jun 2026] Desiree Diaz: OKAY DO YOU HAVE FUNDS TO PAY FOR A TOW TRUCK ? [13:40:05 GMT-07:00 10 Jun 2026] (321) 310-2480: It is a rental car that should be covered by the rental company [13:40:22 GMT-07:00 10 Jun 2026] Desiree Diaz: OKAY ARE YOU GOING TO CONTACT THEM ? [13:40:56 GMT-07:00 10 Jun 2026] (321) 310-2480: We are attempting to but there is very limited internet connection here[13:41:22 GMT-07:00 10 Jun 2026] Desiree Diaz: OKAY IF YOU ARE UNABLE TO GET A HOLD OF THEM IF I START YOU A TOW TRUCK ARE YOU ABLE TO PAY FOR IT ? [13:42:00 GMT-07:00 10 Jun 2026] (321) 310-2480: How much would the cost be?[13:42:14 GMT-07:00 10 Jun 2026] Desiree Diaz: I CAN CHECK .WHERE DO YOU WANT TO BE TOWED TO ? [13:47:09 GMT-07:00 10 Jun 2026] (321) 310-2480: Apple Systems The user's device sent a location update:Latitude 36.3692 N, Longitude -121.9019 W. Search area +/-30 meters.Altitude 52 meters. Search height +/-30 meters.The user's device battery state is 31-60%.[13:47:20 GMT-07:00 10 Jun 2026] (321) 310-2480: We don't know yet it is not our car it's a rental [13:47:43 GMT-07:00 10 Jun 2026] (321) 310-2480: Bixby creek bridge [13:53:06 GMT-07:00 10 Jun 2026] Desiree Diaz: OUR NEXT TOW COMPANY SAID IT WOULD BE AROUND $400 IF YOU WANT TO GO TO CARMEL AND AROUND $450 TO GO TO SEASIDE [14:02:46 GMT-07:00 10 Jun 2026] (321) 310-2480: Apple Systems The user's device sent a location update:Latitude 36.3692 N, Longitude -121.9019 W. Search area +/-30 meters.Altitude 48 meters.
